name: MICRON TECHNOLOGY INC
summary: Micron Technology, Inc. is a global semiconductor company that designs and manufactures memory and storage products. Its portfolio includes DRAM (including High-Bandwidth Memory), NAND-based solid state drives, and other memory solutions sold under the Micron and Crucial brands. Micron serves original equipment manufacturers and other customers across computing, AI, data center, mobile, and consumer markets. The company operates manufacturing facilities globally and invests heavily in R&D, including EUV lithography.

products.name: DRAM
products.description: Double data rate dynamic random-access memory including DDR variants for computing and enterprise applications.

products.name: High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM)
products.description: High-bandwidth memory products targeted at AI and high-performance computing workloads.

products.name: Solid State Drives (SSD)
products.description: NAND-based solid state drives for consumer and enterprise storage applications.

products.name: Crucial
products.description: Consumer-facing memory and storage brand offering DRAM modules and SSDs.
